# ISwrStore.InvalidateByPrefix method

Removes all cache entries whose keys start with the given prefix.

```csharp
public void InvalidateByPrefix(string prefix)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| prefix | The key prefix to match. All entries with keys starting with this prefix are removed. |
